steps.title: Identify what proves inspiration
steps.content: The student claims CPB/NPR were “inspired by” BBC. To prove this, evidence must show US legislators adopted the BBC's approach. The decisive clue: which quotation reveals both the BBC's purpose and that US lawmakers followed it?

steps.title: Match the parallel purpose
steps.content: D does this uniquely: BBC's goal was informed citizens supporting democracy, and US legislators believed the same approach would support US democracy. The other three fail to link the BBC's philosophy to US decision-making. That matches choice D — D is correct.
